title: VLCCs in vogue
summary:
Main
Image reference: Crude-Tanker.jpg | assets/2025-02-02_vlccs-in-vogue_img_crude-tanker_fb6f869b3cec.jpg
VLCCs are enjoying a moment in the spotlight. A low orderbook and sanctions news have put a spotlight on the largest asset class in the tanker markets. However, the outlook for VLCCs has been promising before and freight rates have consistently underwhelmed.
